description: A critical privacy breach has been identified in the 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' (CV-REG-2023). The site coordinator at 'Boston Heart Institute' mistakenly entered internal Medical Record Numbers (MRNs) as Study Subject IDs, and typed the patients' real names into the Secondary ID field. Remediate this PHI violation in the OpenClinica web interface (login: root / Admin123!). At the 'Boston Heart Institute' site, update subject 'MRN-84729' to Study Subject ID 'CV-301', 'MRN-55912' to 'CV-302', and 'MRN-11048' to 'CV-303', ensuring all corresponding Secondary IDs ('John Doe', 'Mary Smith', and 'Robert Jones') are completely cleared. Additionally, update the 'Boston Heart Institute' Facility Name in the registry administration to include the exact phrase 'CAPA ACTIVE' (e.g., 'Boston Heart Institute - CAPA ACTIVE').
